note: Merged 'Phoenix', 'Phoenix Mine', 'Phoenix deposit', and 'Phikwe deposit' into canonical 'Phoenix deposit'. 'Phikwe deposit' is treated as an alias for the Phoenix deposit in the Selebi-Phikwe mining district.

Both entities are distinct geological structures and should not be merged despite both being classified as Structure type. The Tati greenstone belt is a specific greenstone belt, while the Francistown Arc Complex is a distinct arc complex.
All three stratigraphic units are distinct and do not require merging.
Merged singular/plural variants of rock types (tholeiitic basalts → tholeiitic basalt, granites → granite)
Normalized 'meta-gabbronoritic intrusions' to 'metagabbronoritic intrusions' (removed hyphen for consistency)
Kept metagabbronorite separate from gabbronorite (different metamorphic grade)
Merged 'Abu Swayel area' and 'Swayel mine area' as they refer to the same geographic region around the Abu Swayel deposit.
Merged all Abu Swayel variants (Abu Swayel, Abu Swayel deposit, Abu Swayel mine, Abu Swayel Cu-Ni deposit, Abu Swayel copper prospect, Swayel deposit) into canonical 'Abu Swayel deposit'.
Gabbro Akarem and Genina Gharbia are distinct deposits and were not merged.
Source information (document_id, paragraph_id) was not provided in the input entities; therefore, sources are listed as empty arrays.
